text: Yesterday we stayed in the Nova University Medical School of Lisbon and we performed the cadaveric lap with five tables with surgeons coming from many countries and it was a success.
We've been using in the cadaver lab yesterday, we had the opportunity to use our smart stapler.
It's one of our newest stapler that is powered and it's an intelligent device that indicates several lighting to make the surgery safer and make the processes smooth and simple.
That is our new energy device that we just launched this year.

We will broadcast the cases to the auditorium and the participants will have the opportunity to see a uniportal VATS lobectomy and we'll have also a case for uniportal RATS, uniportal robotic surgery, where we will perform a uniportal RATS anatomic secondectomy.
